data.name: Enatus Radi
data.detailed_description:
角色介绍


以自我为中心，却让人讨厌不起来。
十分依赖同样丧失了记忆的主人公。
本故事亦是以她为中心而展开。


很擅长照料他人而被艾娜卷入事件的一般冒险者。
平日里情绪波动不大，表情变化很少。


相当喜欢睡觉的少女。只要有空便会去睡觉。
平日里照看失去记忆的艾娜，
似乎知晓艾娜的秘密……。


喜欢可爱事物的军人，平日里一副姐姐的姿态。
因为喜欢捉弄其他女孩子，所以没少被茜露殴打。

故事剧情

主人公苏醒之后，发现自己失去了之前的记忆。
同样失去记忆的，还有一位名为艾娜的少女，
为了找寻真相，两人踏上了游历世界的旅途――。

期间不断结识了性格各异的同伴，
也让这段旅途充满了欢声笑语，以及乐此不疲的各色片段。

游戏特色

  • JRPG
  • 可自定义技能树
  • 可自选难易度
  • 素材收集
  • 可通过抽奖获得强力武器

data.short_description: 主人公苏醒之后，发现自己失去了之前的记忆。 同样失去记忆的，还有一位名为艾娜的少女， 为了找寻真相，两人踏上了游历世界的旅途――。 期间不断结识了性格各异的同伴， 也让这段旅途充满了欢声笑语，以及乐此不疲的各色片段。
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Enatus Radi
data.detailed_description:
Sometimes she can be selfish, but no one would blame her. She has no memory
of her past. She also is the key character of the main story.


A normal adventurer. She gets involved in Ena's journey because of her kindness.
She's poker face and always in a low tension.


Her favorite thing is sleeping. She takes care of Ena, who lost her memory and
she seems to know something about Ena's secret ...


A soldier who likes cute things. She always acts like an older sister, and gets
scolded by Cielo every time she tries to do naughty things to other girls.


After the protagonist wakes up, he finds that he has lost his memory.
The first girl he met named Ena also lost her memory. In order to find the reason
and the truth, they embarked on a journey to the world.
During their journey, they made acquaintances with companions with different
personalities, which also made this journey full of laughter and colorful
memories.


  • Classic turn-based battle JRPG
  • Unique skill trees
  • Weapon gacha system
  • Collect materials on the field
  • Multiple difficulty levels
